# Security Test Report

##  Test Result: SKIP

**Test:** Auth cookie flags from login response (Secure, HttpOnly, SameSite)
**Timestamp:** 2026-05-15T03:09:00.763Z
**OWASP Category:** N/A

## Description

Test skipped: Authentication response from /api/login did not include a Set-Cookie header; cookie-based auth hardening is not applicable to this flow.

## Why this result

Skipped because Authentication response from /api/login did not include a Set-Cookie header; cookie-based auth hardening is not applicable to this flow.
